name: mail-mcp
description: Local MCP server for macOS Mail reads plus unsent compose, reply, and forward drafts.

scripts.build: node --input-type=module --eval "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run test && npm run build && npm run build:helper-app:ci
